name: Spacey
description: Spaceys generative 3D/spatial asset API for e-commerce and AR experiences.

seo.title: Spacey — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Spacey: Spaceys generative 3D/spatial asset API for e-commerce and AR experiences.

when_to_use: Building spatial AI applications for location-based services
Running geospatial analysis and AI prediction on map data
Deploying place-based AI features for retail or real estate
Combining spatial data with ML for location intelligence apps

pros: Speeds up PDP and try-on experiences
review.verdict: Useful if you need commerce-grade 3D assets at scale, but expect to clean up meshes for hero SKUs.
review.best_for: E-commerce teams adding AR and 3D viewers to large product catalogs
review.not_for: Game studios or design shops needing production-grade hand-authored 3D

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metered billing scales up and down
